title: Multi-day calendar (daily) view

posts.author: ashleyct (Ashley Visagie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there

Apologies if this question has already been asked, I am new to Monday.com

I would like to know if there is a way to customise the calendar view so that I can see an hour by hour schedule (daily view) over three days. This would be helpful in event planning to be able to see the full schedule in the daily view style rather than in the week view.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ashley!

You can absolutely set up your Calendar View to see by the day! You can see the calendar by day, week, or month. However, you won’t be able to see three days at a time without clicking back to the “week” view.

Here is where you’ll find that option:

Screen Shot 2023-10-25 at 2.30.02 PM1838×482 44.4 KB

I hope this helps!
